content: GitHub Issues adapter pattern (overstory-25a1): createGitHubTracker() in src/tracker/github.ts follows seeds.ts structure exactly — runGh() helper, parseGhJson() without envelope stripping (gh outputs clean JSON), normalizeIssue() maps label conventions (priority:<n>, type:<name>, ov-ready/ov-active) to TrackerIssue. Factory adds 'github' case to switch, resolveBackend passthrough, trackerCliName returns 'gh'.

GitHub poller config pattern (overstory-de7a): GitHubPollerConfig in types.ts with pollIntervalMs (default 30000), readyLabel (default 'ov-ready'), activeLabel (default 'ov-active'), maxConcurrent (default 5), owner?, repo?. Nested under taskTracker.github in OverstoryConfig. coordinator.autoPull?: boolean controls auto-start. Pruning: each tick fetches activeLabel issues and removes non-active from dispatched state so maxConcurrent stays accurate.
